import * as yargs from 'yargs' import { getConfig } from '@tanstack/router-generator' import { generate } from './generate' import { watch } from './watch' main() export function main() { yargs // @ts-expect-error .scriptName('tsr') .usage('$0 <cmd> [args]') .command('generate', 'Generate the routes for a project', async () => { const config = getConfig() await generate(config, process.cwd()) }) .command( 'watch', 'Continuously watch and generate the routes for a project', () => { watch(process.cwd()) }, ) .help().argv }
